hints.modelUsageTrend: Rule: 7-day avg volume down >10% vs prior 28-day avg → bubble warning, AI supply forced tight. Top of cash flow: users pay model providers
hints.capexYoY: Rule: hyperscaler (MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL/META) rolling-4Q capex YoY <0% → bubble warning, AI supply forced tight. 2nd layer: model providers buy cloud compute
hints.semiIpYoy: Rule: semiconductor industrial production YoY >+5% → loose, <0% → tight; must agree with market proxy, else neutral. 3rd layer: clouds buy chips
hints.smhSpyRelReturn: Rule: SMH−SPY 90-day relative return >+8% → loose, <−8% → tight; must agree with fundamental proxy, else neutral
hints.rate: Rule: single adjustment ≥50bp (reactive, either direction) → tight and triggers reactive adjustment lock (forced defense); <50bp or pause → loose
hints.balanceSheet: Rule: WoW >+0.25% → QE (loose), <−0.25% → QT (tight), between → pause. Monetary = rate loose AND no QT → loose; reactive move OR QT → tight
hints.sahm: Rule: Sahm value <0.5% → loose; ≥0.5% → early recession, triggers Sahm lock (forced defense); unlocks at rate ≤0.25% or a <50bp small adjustment
hints.fiscalDeficitTtm: Rule (small-government principle): TTM deficit YoY expands >5% → tight (government expanding, tax/fee hikes expected, harmful to markets); shrinks >5% → loose (government shrinking, room for tax cuts); between → neutral
hints.epuTrade: Rule: trade policy uncertainty index (monthly, trade/tariff/tech-war specific) 10-year percentile >80 → tight, <50 → loose; must agree with daily EPU, else neutral
hints.reference: Reference only, not part of signal judgment
hints.epuDaily: Rule: daily economic policy uncertainty index 7-day MA (news-based; reacts within days to policy pivots like tariff pauses) 10-year percentile >80 → tight, <50 → loose; must agree with the monthly trade index, else neutral

indicators.hintGlobal: Global rule: Attack = all four loose (AND); Defense = any one tight (OR); Sahm/reactive locks force defense when active
indicators.staleHint: Data source temporarily unavailable; last valid judgment retained

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.percentileHint: Position of current price within all closes of the selected range. Rule: ≥80% high (red, euphoria — be cautious / consider selling); ≤20% low (green, neglected — watch for buying); 20–80% mid (yellow, wait). 99% = near range high, 10% = near range low
watchlist.valuationHint: ETFs/indexes have no financial statements, so blank P/E and P/S is normal; for individual stocks, blanks usually mean a temporary data-source rate limit — refresh later

interpret.title: Signal Interpretation
interpret.allLoose: All four dimensions loose — attack conditions met

recessionLock.waitCondition: Waiting for rate to reach 0-0.25% or a small adjustment to unlock

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.lockOverrideNote: Emergency valve: manually clear if data anomaly caused a false trigger

error.fetchFailed: Failed to load data, showing cached results

aiChain.title: AI Industry Chain Money Flow
aiChain.bubbleWarning: Bubble warning: AI demand indicators weakening, consider defense
